Title: Cancel Monitoring on Rejected Trade

Title: Fix Contract ID Combo Box font colour issue
Description: Root cause (definitive): WPF Aero2 theme ControlTemplate renders selected text via system brushes — Foreground on element or Style setters has no effect regardless of priority. Fix: replaced ComboBoxes3.xaml with a full ControlTemplate for both ComboBox and ComboBoxItem. TextElement.Foreground and TextBlock.Foreground set directly on ContentPresenter inside template so inherited value is a local attached-property on the presenter itself — system theme cannot reach it. Removed conflicting local Foreground/Background overrides from ContractSelectorControl.xaml.
Notes: ✅ Attempt 8 — full ControlTemplate approach. Build 0 errors 0 warnings. Awaiting visual confirmation.

Title: Economic Calendar Filter for AI Trade

Notes: Spun off from TICKET-014. See TICKET-020_Economic_Calendar_Filter.md for full spec. Lower priority - risk mitigation feature.

Title: Fix Position Close Detection — Poll TopStepX API Instead of Local Database
Description: Local DB Orders table is never updated when exchange fills/cancels bracket orders. GetOpenOrdersAsync always returns both TP+SL as Working so _positionOpen never resets. Added GetLiveWorkingOrdersAsync to IOrderService that calls SearchOrdersAsync (TopStepX API) directly. DoCheckAsync now uses API ground truth. Note: local OrderStatus enum diverges from API status codes at value >=3.
Notes: See TICKET-027_Fix_Position_Close_Detection_API_Poll.md. 3 files changed: IOrderService + OrderService + StrategyExecutionEngine. Build 0 errors 0 warnings.
